reason: DTO class-validator decorator metadata (IIFE in decorator application) — architectural ceiling per NestJS framework limits. DecoratorApplicationIIFE cannot be executed in unit test context. Branches: @ApiProperty, @IsEnum, @IsOptional, @IsObject, @IsDateString on CreateCampaignDto (lines 14-18) represent metadata application, not runtime code paths.
solution: Gap is fixable only at framework level (Jest/NestJS integration) or via integration tests. Unit test isolation prevents decorator IIFE execution. This is documented in .claude/skills/audit-modulo/SKILL.md as standard CEILING_ACCEPTED pattern.

added_tests: findAll with numeric page string should parse to integer
findAll with page/limit undefined should use defaults
findAll with status filter should pass to service
findAll with status SENT should filter correctly
findAll with status CANCELLED should filter correctly
previewRecipients with no segmentType should call service without segment
previewRecipients with segmentType INACTIVE_6M should pass segment to service
update should pass all parameters to service
create should call service with CreateCampaignDto
findAll with all parameters should construct correct pagination
findOne should invoke service with correct parameters
send should return campaign with SENDING status
getStats should return stats object with rates
